revision.comment: link to category on Commons is now defined on wikidata
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:tab went inactive so I need to add another category]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] to [[Category:new pages]][[Category:new pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
fixing pages in [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Removing from [[Category:Tab went inactive so I need to add another category]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Adding [[Category:Category adjustment]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:category adjustment]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 15:38:37
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Navseasoncats}} {{Commons category}} [[Category:5th century| country]] [[Category:Centuries by country]] [[en:Category:5th century by country]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
revision.text: {{Navseasoncats}} {{Commons category}} [[Category:5th century| country]] [[Category:Centuries by country]] [[en:Category:5th century by country]] [[en:Category:5th century by country]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6521834)

Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{Commons category}}
{{wikidata link|Q6521834}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:5th century by country]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:5th century| country]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Centuries by country]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=5th_century_by_country here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<!--templates-->
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{Commons category}}
{{wikidata link|Q6521834}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:5th century by country]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:5th century| country]]
[[Category:Centuries by country]]
